summary: Completed testing of Certified Clients Registry (BAC-F6-19) feature. Backend: 16/16 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All flows working - page loads, stats cards, data table, Create/View/Edit modals, PDF download, Excel export.

fixed_issues.issue: Duplicate import of 'Award' from lucide-react causing build error

critical_code_review_comments: Certified Clients CRUD operations all working correctly
Stats endpoint returns total, active, suspended, expired, expiring_soon, surveillance_1/2_upcoming counts
Excel export generates proper XLSX with styled headers and data
PDF generator creates bilingual PDF with all client details
Auto-expiry check updates status when expiry_date < today

seed_data.existing_record: ABC Manufacturing Co. - CERT-2025-0001 with ISO 9001:2015 and ISO 14001:2015 accreditations

context_for_next_testing_agent: Certified Clients Registry (BAC-F6-19) fully tested. All CRUD, stats, Excel export, and PDF generation working. Sidebar had duplicate Award import which was fixed. Existing record ABC Manufacturing Co. with serial_number=1, cert=CERT-2025-0001.

endpoints_verified.GET /api/certified-clients: WORKING - Lists all clients with optional status filter
endpoints_verified.POST /api/certified-clients: WORKING - Creates client with serial_number auto-increment
endpoints_verified.DELETE /api/certified-clients/{id}: WORKING - Deletes client, returns 404 if not found

frontend_verified.Page Load: WORKING - Title, stats cards (Total/Active/Expiring/Expired/Surv1/Surv2), data table, action buttons
frontend_verified.Navigation: WORKING - Sidebar link 'certified-clients' with Award icon navigates correctly
frontend_verified.Create Modal: WORKING - All fields: Client Name EN/AR, Address EN/AR, Contact Person/Number, Scope EN/AR, Standards checkboxes, EA Code, Certificate Number, Dates (Issue/Expiry/Recert/Surv1/Surv2)
frontend_verified.View Modal: WORKING - Shows certificate number header, status badge, client info, certification details, important dates
frontend_verified.Edit Modal: WORKING - Client name, cert number, contact person/number, status dropdown, all dates, notes
frontend_verified.Excel Export: WORKING - Export button triggers file download

mocked_apis.note: All APIs are real, no mocking
